mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CMN_WEBUSER_CAN_MST /** userInfoMgmtMapper.userInfoMgmtService */ ( USERID, NAME, MOBILE_NO, FIRST_LOGIN_DT, LAST_LOGIN_DT , EMAIL, ZIPCD, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, RESULT_YN , REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT A.USERID, A.NAME, A.MOBILE_NO, TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.SYS_LDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYYMMDD') , A.EMAIL, A.POST, A.ADDRESS, A.ADDRESS_DTL, 'N' , 'SYSTEM', SYSDATE, 'SYSTEM', SYSDATE FROM MCP_USER@DL_MCP A WHERE A.STATUS = '1' AND A.AUTH_CODE = 'USER_ROLE' AND A.USER_DIVISION = '00' AND TO_DATE(A.SYS_LDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') BETWEEN TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE , -11), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE -1, -10), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CMN_WEBUSER_CAN_MST WHERE USERID = A.USERID)
